race.comment: BRUTALINA (2) went fast early over 1325m at Geelong last time and defied all challengers to score by a long neck. Drawn to stalk the leaders. Best figures measure up and gets in well after the claim for a rider who has struck a purple patch of form. BELCONY (10) went forward last start over 1600m at this track and held on well for second, beaten 1.75 lengths. Second the start prior after a first-up win, so hard to knock the form and no reason he won't be thereabouts again from the gun draw. GLENFINNAN (4) finished third last start over 1400m at Sandown-Lakeside when he made late ground, beaten 3 lengths. That was her best run in ages, which was an encouraging sign and she's worth sticking with. HONEY MAKER (11) is a model of consistency who just needs a good run from the gate to feature.
